benefits.description: Eliminated just the right amount of food noise
Helped with losing fat, aided by improved ability to move/exercise due to reduced inflammation
Helped with inflammation, was able to get moving the way they used to

side_effects.description: Tendons and joints sore and achy (noted as a general observation about tirz users, context unclear if personal)

protocol_notes: Casual comment about low dose tirz experience; inflammation reduction helped mobility and fat loss. Tendon/joint soreness comment may be general observation rather than personal side effect.
